ogTitle: Yarrowyck vs Yass River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yarrowyck and Yass River.
heading: Yarrowyck vs Yass River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yarrowyck, New South Wales and Yass River, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yass River has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Yarrowyck (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yarrowyck or Yass River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yarrowyck has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Yass River scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yarrowyck scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Yass River scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yarrowyck or Yass River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yass River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
